prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为约7422名、31003名（A1段）、12487名、23366名（A1段）、15115名，波动极为剧烈。2022年和2024年因A1段招生 出现位次大幅后移，2025年回归至15115名，近两年基准位次约15000名区间；该校在山西省物理类招生计划2021年36人、2022年33人、2023年35人、2024年33人 、2025年35人；2026年计划40人，较2025年扩招5人（+14.3%），扩招幅度较大，对竞争有加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国传媒大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中 国大学排名2026年主榜第82名，近年排名稳定在82–84名区间，属全国中上游水平；2025年高考周期声誉评价为偏正面（新闻传播学A++学科排名）；2026年周期 内出现宿舍火灾等校园安全事件，声誉转为偏负面。抖音热度排名总榜第11位（高热），报考关注度较高；新闻传播学为A+学科（全国顶尖），与物理类招生的 传播学（信息传播方向）、新闻学（新闻舆论学方向）等专业对应，对物理类考生也有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类专业2024–2025年为高热推荐，电气 工程及其自动化高热推荐，计算机类推荐，这些专业与中传物理类招生的通信工程、电子信息工程、数字媒体技术、网络空间安全等高度相关，专业热度升温推动报考竞争。山西 省2026年物理类考生约167419人，较2025年173347人减少约3.4%，考生规模小幅下降，竞争略有缓解。；中国传媒大学位于 北京，对山西省考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在山西省物理类招生占比约2%–3%，属中等偏下水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次15115名、2026年扩招5人（+14.3%，加 剧竞争）、电子信息/通信等热门专业持续升温（推高报考热度），以及物理类考生小幅减少（略微缓解竞争），预计2026年最低位次较2025年有所后移。预测最低位次约16460名 ，区间15960–16960名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 7422, 31003 (A1 segment), 12487, 23366 (A1 segment), and 15115, showing extreme volatility. In 2022 and 2024, due to A1 segment enrollment, rankings significantly dropped, and in 2025 they returned to 15115, with a baseline ranking of about 15000 in recent two years. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Shanxi was 36 in 2021, 33 in 2022, 35 in 2023, 33 in 2024, and 35 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 40, an increase of 5 students (+14.3%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Communication University of China is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 82nd on the main list, with a stable ranking in the 82-84 range in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. During the 2025 Gaokao cycle, its reputation evaluation was slightly positive (Journalism and Communication A++ discipline ranking). In the 2026 cycle, campus safety incidents such as a dormitory fire occurred, turning the reputation slightly negative. On Douyin, it ranks 11th in the overall popularity list (high heat), attracting significant application attention. Journalism and Communication is an A+ discipline (top nationally), corresponding to majors like Communication (Information Communication direction) and Journalism (Public Opinion direction) in Physics Category enrollment, which also attracts Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors were highly recommended in 2024-2025, Electrical Engineering and Automation was highly recommended, and Computer majors were recommended. These are highly related to majors enrolled in Physics Category at CUC, such as Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, Digital Media Technology, and Cyberspace Security. The rising popularity of these majors drives competition. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Shanxi is approximately 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Communication University of China is located in Beijing, which has strong cross-provincial appeal for Shanxi candidates. Its enrollment proportion in Physics Category in Shanxi is about 2%-3%, which is moderately low.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 15115, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 5 students (+14.3%, intensifying competition), the continued heating up of popular majors like Electronic Information/Communication (increasing application heat), and the slight decrease in Physics Category candidates (slightly easing competition), it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 16460, with a range of 15960-16960.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 15960), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular engineering majors.
